title: addisonbeck.com Project Dependencies Report
ast: This node documents the full dependency set for the addisonbeck.com static site project, located at
. The site renders an org-roam second brain as a public-facing web reader using a Rust renderer, an Astro static site, and a Nix devshell to tie them together.
The build pipeline has three distinct layers:
) -- consumes rendered fragments to build a fully static site; Svelte islands for interactivity; Pagefind for full-text search
) -- pins exact versions of Rust, Node.js, and CLI tools; syncs org-roam export cache on entry
Exact Rust compiler + cargo for renderer
(oxalica) resolves the exact Rust toolchain from
Serialization/deserialization framework; derive macros for struct annotations
JSON parsing and serialization (reads org-element AST JSON, writes output JSON)
Date/time handling; serde feature enables JSON round-trip for timestamps
CLI argument parsing; derive feature for struct-based argument definitions
The renderer is intentionally minimal: no HTTP client, no templating engine, no async runtime. All four crates are stable and widely-used.
Svelte integration for Astro islands (interactive components)
Pagefind integration -- runs indexing automatically after build
All four packages are runtime dependencies (no separate devDependencies). Astro static output mode means no server-side JS is deployed. Pagefind produces a static search index in
Pinning ensures reproducible builds in CI and local dev
: pnpm and yarn are explicitly prohibited; using them breaks the Nix build
: Should be committed for a binary crate to ensure reproducible Rust builds
: Uses runes-based reactivity (not Svelte 4); significant model change
): more conservative than typical, avoids unintended patch updates
with derive: uses modern derive-based API, not the deprecated builder pattern from clap 3.x
: rolling channel; devshell tool versions update when flake inputs are updated

ast.value:
addisonbeck.com
+-- Nix devshell (flake.nix)
|   +-- rust-overlay -> rustToolchain (1.94.1 stable)
|   +-- nodejs_24
|   +-- just
|   +-- rsync
|   +-- fswatch
|
+-- Rust renderer (renderer/Cargo.toml)
|   +-- serde 1.0.228 [derive]
|   +-- serde_json 1.0.149
|   +-- chrono 0.4.44 [serde]
|   +-- clap 4.6.0 [derive]
|
+-- Astro site (site/package.json)
    +-- astro 6.1.4
    +-- @astrojs/svelte 8.0.4
    +-- svelte 5.55.1
    +-- astro-pagefind 1.8.6
